data.title: U.S. to Begin Refunding $166 Billion in Trump-Era Tariffs After Supreme Court Ruling
data.description:
Key Takeaways
The US government is beginning a process to refund roughly $166 billion in tariffs imposed under emergency powers during the Trump administration.More than 330,000 importers covering about 53 million shipments may be eligible.Refunds are expected within 60 to 90 days for straightforward claims.The Supreme Court ruled that only Congress has the authority to impose tariffs under the relevant law.
The US government is launching a new refund system for businesses that paid tariffs imposed under former President Donald Trump under emergency powers.
The move follows a Supreme Court ruling that found those tariffs unlawful because they were imposed under emergency powers rather than through Congress. The Court concluded that only Congress has the authority to impose tariffs in this way.
The refund process will be handled through a new customs system that allows businesses to file claims electronically and receive consolidated refund payments with interest.
More than 330,000 importers across roughly 53 million shipments may qualify for refunds, with total repayments estimated at around $166 billion.
Businesses that previously paid the tariffs can submit claims through the new customs portal.
Officials expect many standard claims to be processed within 60 to 90 days, although more complex cases may take longer due to the scale of the refund effort and the need for additional review.
The refunds will go directly to the importers that actually paid the tariffs rather than to consumers, although some businesses may later pass on benefits through lower prices or future settlements.

data.title: Unicoin Inc. Establishes Independent Foundation for Education and Ecosystem Development
data.description: Unicoin Inc., a cryptocurrency investment company, has announced the creation of the Unicoin Foundation. According to Foresight News, the foundation will be chaired by investor Robert Newman and governed by a board of 27 directors elected by shareholders. It will operate independently from Unicoin Inc., focusing on educational initiatives and ecosystem development programs. Previously, over 4,000 Unicoin shareholders participated in a governance vote, with nearly 99% supporting the transition to an independent foundation structure. Management responsibilities will officially shift from Unicoin Inc. to the foundation.

data.title: ECB Official Cautions on Iran War's Impact on Euro-Zone Economy
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran remains a significant concern for the euro-zone economy, according to European Central Bank Governing Council member Alvaro Santos Pereira. Bloomberg posted on X that Pereira emphasized the difficulty in fully understanding the war's repercussions on the region's economic stability. The situation continues to evolve, and its effects on various sectors within the euro-zone are yet to be fully assessed. Pereira's comments highlight the uncertainty faced by policymakers as they navigate the potential economic challenges posed by the conflict.

data.title: ETH whales have been consistently taking profits recently, closing out positions multiple times and accumulating gains exceeding $690,000.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), an "ETH leveraged whale that made $44.61 million in profits over two months" closed out its long positions in 4,000 ETH this afternoon, realizing a profit of approximately $144,000. Additionally, another address, 0x6c8…d84f6, took profits on another 20,000 ETH in the past half hour, with a trading volume of approximately $46.33 million and a profit of approximately $551,000. It currently holds approximately 20,000 ETH, with a floating profit of approximately $296,000.

data.title: Tether Subsidiaries Acquire Significant Stake in Bitcoin Mining Firm Antalpha
data.description:
Tether's subsidiaries and its chairman, Giancarlo Devasini, have collectively acquired 1.95 million common shares in the Bitcoin mining financial services company Antalpha, representing 8.2% of its total shares post-IPO. According to ChainCatcher, Antalpha's initial public offering raised approximately $49.3 million, with an issue price of $12.8 per share, and Tether subscribed to about half of the issued shares.

Antalpha maintains a close relationship with Bitmain and primarily offers Bitcoin-backed loans and mining equipment supply chain financing. The company's loan portfolio is projected to reach approximately $1.6 billion by the end of 2024.

data.title: Ethereum News: Tom Lee Says Crypto Bear Market Is Nearing an End as Ethereum Benefits From Two Major Themes
data.description:
Key Takeaways
Tom Lee believes the current crypto bear market is approaching its end.He said Ethereum has rebounded 41% from its February lows.Lee highlighted tokenization and AI as Ethereum’s two biggest long-term growth drivers.He argued that Ethereum has been one of the best-performing global assets since the Middle East conflict began.
Tom Lee Sees Signs of a Crypto Recovery
Tom Lee said there are growing indications that the recent “mini crypto winter” is close to ending.
According to Lee, Ethereum has rallied roughly 41% from its early February lows as fears around the Middle East conflict have gradually eased.
He added that Ethereum has outperformed the broader stock market since the war began, beating the S&P 500 by more than 2,280 basis points.
Ethereum Continues to Benefit From Two Major Narratives
Lee said Ethereum remains supported by two powerful long-term trends:
Wall Street’s growing push toward tokenizing traditional financial assets on blockchainsRising demand for neutral, public blockchain infrastructure for AI agents and autonomous systems
Ethereum has increasingly become the dominant network for stablecoins, tokenized funds and other real-world assets.
Major institutions including BlackRock, JPMorgan and Amundi have all launched tokenized products on Ethereum, reinforcing its position as the leading blockchain for institutional finance.
At the same time, Lee believes Ethereum could play an important role in future AI infrastructure, particularly as autonomous AI systems increasingly require open and neutral settlement layers.
Ethereum Viewed as a “Wartime Store of Value”
Lee also argued that Ethereum’s recent strength reflects its growing status as a “wartime store of value.”
While oil has been the best-performing major asset during the conflict, Ethereum has been among the strongest-performing non-energy assets globally since the Middle East tensions began.
Lee Expects a Shallower Downturn Than Previous Cycles
Many market participants believe the current crypto downturn could continue into late 2026.
However, Tom Lee said the current cycle may be less severe than previous crypto winters.
Since 2015, major crypto bear markets have typically coincided with stock market declines of at least 20%.
Lee noted that the 2025 crypto correction aligned with a roughly 20% decline in the S&P 500.
By contrast, he expects the current stock market pullback to remain relatively mild at around 8%, which could help support a faster recovery for crypto assets.

data.title: Africa's Oil Shock from Iran Conflict Was Preventable
data.description: Africa is facing an oil shock due to the ongoing conflict involving Iran, a situation that experts believe could have been avoided. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting insights from Justice Malala, who argues that strategic measures could have mitigated the impact on African economies. The disruption in oil supply has led to increased prices and economic strain across the continent. Analysts suggest that proactive policies and international cooperation might have cushioned the blow, emphasizing the need for future preparedness in handling geopolitical tensions affecting global energy markets.

data.title: Trump: Willing to meet with senior Iranian leaders if there is a breakthrough
data.description: According to the New York Post, US President Trump said on the 20th that he would be willing to meet with senior Iranian leaders if negotiations made a breakthrough.

data.title: Bitcoin News: Strategy Buys 34,164 Bitcoin for $2.54 Billion, Holdings Surpass 815,000 BTC
data.description:
Key Takeaways
Strategy purchased 34,164 BTC for $2.54 billion last week.The acquisition ranks as the company’s third-largest Bitcoin purchase on record.Strategy now holds 815,061 BTC worth more than $61.5 billion.Most of the purchase was funded through STRC preferred stock sales.
Strategy Adds Another 34,164 Bitcoin
Strategy acquired 34,164 additional Bitcoin between April 13 and April 19 for approximately $2.54 billion.
The company paid an average price of $74,395 per Bitcoin.
Following the latest purchase, Strategy’s total Bitcoin holdings have risen to 815,061 BTC, purchased for a combined $61.56 billion.
Its average acquisition cost across all holdings now stands at $75,527 per Bitcoin.
Third-Largest Bitcoin Purchase in Company History
The latest acquisition is Strategy’s third-largest Bitcoin purchase ever by coin count.
Only two previous purchases in November 2024 were larger:
55,500 BTC51,780 BTC
At current prices near $75,000, Strategy’s Bitcoin position is now roughly at breakeven after previously sitting underwater for much of the year.
STRC Preferred Stock Continues to Drive Purchases
The majority of the latest purchase was funded through sales of Strategy’s STRC preferred stock.
STRC generated approximately $2.18 billion, accounting for about 86% of the total proceeds used for the Bitcoin purchase.
An additional $366 million came from sales of Strategy’s Class A common stock.
Michael Saylor has increasingly relied on STRC as a funding vehicle for Bitcoin accumulation, as investor demand for the high-yield preferred stock remains strong.
STRC Sets New Records
Last week also marked several new milestones for STRC.
On April 13, Strategy sold 11.9 million STRC shares through its at-the-market program, generating more than $1 billion in volume and funding an estimated 7,741 BTC purchase.
The following day, the company sold 14.4 million shares, generating enough proceeds for another estimated 9,364 BTC.
Together, the two days accounted for roughly 17,204 BTC in buying power, representing a 518% increase compared with the prior four-week average.
Strategy Pushes Toward One Million Bitcoin
With 815,061 BTC now under its control, Strategy owns roughly 4% of the total circulating supply of Bitcoin.
The company remains by far the largest public corporate holder of Bitcoin globally and continues to expand its treasury position aggressively despite ongoing market volatility.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Market Opens with Mixed Performance
data.description: The U.S. stock market opened with mixed results as the Dow Jones Industrial Average remained nearly flat, while the S&P 500 Index fell by 0.1% and the Nasdaq Composite Index dropped by 0.2%. According to Jin10, oil and gas stocks experienced gains, with Exxon Mobil Corporation rising by 0.6% and BP increasing by 0.9%. Adobe Inc. saw a 1.6% increase in its stock price following the launch of its AI-powered agent, CX Enterprise, aimed at enhancing enterprise solutions.

data.title: Fed Nominee Kevin Warsh Suggests Potential for Rate Cuts Amid Productivity Gains
data.description: Kevin Warsh, the nominee for the new Federal Reserve Chair, believes that upcoming productivity growth could provide the Fed with room to lower interest rates, provided that higher productivity leads to economic growth with low inflation. According to Jin10, economist Ed Yardeni also anticipates that the economy will benefit from technological advancements this decade. However, he disagrees that such outcomes would justify rate cuts. Yardeni stated, "While we share Warsh's optimism about productivity, we fundamentally differ on what this means for monetary policy." Yardeni argues that faster growth will raise the natural rate of interest, or R*, which neither stimulates nor restrains the economy. He wrote, "If the Fed lowers the federal funds rate below R*, the risk is that it could fuel financial speculation and instability."

data.title: Institutional Investors Boost Google Stock Holdings Ahead of Earnings Call
data.description: Institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings in Google stock prior to Alphabet's earnings call on April 29. According to NS3.AI, JPMorgan acquired 7.9 million shares, raising its total stake to 99.53 million shares valued at $24.24 billion. Other investment funds also expanded their exposure, with Mercer Global Advisors boosting its holdings by 208% and AllianceBernstein LP increasing its position by 5.8%, totaling over 40 million shares worth nearly $9.75 billion. During this period, Google's stock price rose from $273 at the end of March to $339 by mid-April.

data.title: DeFi Sector Faces Pressure as AAVE and LayerZero's ZRO Drop 22%
data.description: The decentralized finance (DeFi) sector is experiencing significant pressure following a recent bad debt event, with notable declines in several key assets. According to NS3.AI, AAVE and LayerZero's ZRO each fell by 22% in a short period. Other DeFi tokens also faced downturns, with Lido's LDO dropping 19%, Ethena's ENA sliding 13%, and Compound's COMP losing 10%. In contrast, Ethereum (ETH) remained stable during this time. Santiment, a market analysis firm, indicated that these movements reflect sector-specific challenges rather than a widespread selloff of Ethereum.

data.title: Investing Strategy Aligned with Trump's Policies Outperforms S&P 500
data.description:
Eric Balchunas, senior ETF Analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, posted on X about a unique investment strategy that has yielded significant returns since U.S. President Donald Trump took office. This approach, referred to as the 'White House basket,' involves investing in companies that align with Trump's tweets and White House policies. 

According to a recent note by analyst @psarofagis, this strategy has delivered a return of approximately 75% since the beginning of Trump's term, significantly outperforming the S&P 500, which has seen a return of around 20% in the same period. Key contributors to this performance include companies like Intel and USA Rare Earths.

Despite its success, efforts to formalize this strategy into an exchange-traded fund (ETF) have faced challenges. Tuttle, a financial firm, has attempted to create the Government Grift ETF based on this strategy. However, no exchange has agreed to list it, citing its controversial nature, a situation that Balchunas notes is unprecedented.

data.title: LayerZero Identifies Exploit in Kelp DAO's Network
data.description: LayerZero has reported that an exploit in Kelp DAO's decentralized verifier network setup led to the theft of approximately 116,500 rsETH, valued at around $292 million to $293 million, from Kelp's bridge. According to NS3.AI, the attacker utilized the stolen rsETH on Aave, resulting in a reduction of the total value locked (TVL) by about $8.9 billion to $17.5 billion and creating approximately $195 million in bad debt. LayerZero indicated that initial evidence suggests involvement by threat actors linked to North Korea. In response, LayerZero announced it will cease signing or attesting messages for applications that maintain single-verifier setups.

data.title: Bitcoin Trends: Pre-Conference Gains Observed in Historical Data
data.description: According to data from Galaxy Research and Investing.com, Bitcoin has shown a tendency to rise ahead of the Bitcoin Conference. According to NS3.AI, historical data from 2019 to 2025 indicates that Bitcoin experienced gains of approximately 10% before the 2019 event and around 3% prior to the 2024 conference. However, the performance during the conference itself has been mixed, with a pattern of weakness often emerging in the days and weeks following the event.

data.title: Major SOL Bear Address Makes Significant Moves in Crypto Market
data.description:
A major SOL bear address has made notable transactions in the crypto market. According to ChainCatcher, on-chain analysis platform Lookonchain reported that this address deposited 9 million USDC into Hyperliquid within the past 10 hours. The address then opened a 3x leveraged long position in xyz: BRENTOIL, with a position size of 200,700 units.

At the same time, the address continues to hold a short position of 254,800 SOL, valued at approximately 21.6 million USD.

data.title: Iranian official: Reviewing whether to participate in peace talks with the United States
data.description: A senior Iranian official said Iran is actively reviewing its participation in peace talks with the United States, but no final decision has been made yet. (Reuters)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Russia's Gold Reserves Reach 74.1 Million Ounces
data.description: Russia's central bank has reported that as of April 1, the country's gold reserves totaled 74.1 million ounces. According to Jin10, this figure reflects Russia's ongoing strategy to bolster its gold holdings amid global economic uncertainties. The accumulation of gold reserves is seen as a measure to enhance financial stability and reduce reliance on foreign currencies. This move aligns with Russia's broader economic policies aimed at strengthening its position in the global market.

data.title: Tangem Launches Tangem Pay for USDC Transactions via Visa Cards
data.description: Tangem has introduced Tangem Pay, a retail payment service enabling wallet users to spend USDC through virtual Visa cards at any location accepting Visa. According to NS3.AI, Polygon will facilitate on-chain settlement and cover gas fees during the initial rollout phase. The service is currently available in the U.S., excluding certain states, as well as in Latin America and select Asia-Pacific countries.
